info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce operations including product catalog, orders, and user accounts.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management such as listing, creation, update, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Operations for creating, updating, and tracking customer orders.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profile updates.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current contents and details of the shopping cart belonging to the user identified by userId. Returns the full cart including items, quantities, and pricing information.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

example.message: The provided userId is not valid

details.issue: UserId must be a non-empty string

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product and quantity to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart contents after the addition.

requestBody.description: Object representing the item to add to the cart, including product ID and quantity

200.description: Item added successfully, updated cart returned

example.message: The supplied cart item data is invalid

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId, using the current cart or specified purchase details. Returns the order confirmation and details on success.

example.message: The order request data is invalid for the specified user

details.issue: User does not have a valid cart or purchase details

example.message: The user or their cart was not found

details.issue: No cart exists for this user

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve an order by its unique ID
get.description: Fetches detailed information about a specific order identified by orderId, including items, status, and shipping details.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid

details.issue: orderId must be a valid UUID string

example.message: No order found matching the provided orderId

details.issue: No record for this orderId exists

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Initiates a payment transaction based on provided payment details. Returns information confirming initiation and payment status.

requestBody.description: Payment request containing amount, method, and payer information

example.message: Payment request data failed validation
The payment was declined by the payment provider
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Processes incoming webhook notifications from the payment gateway to update payment status and related records accordingly. Accepts JSON payloads describing payment events.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
The payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog with the details provided in the request body. Returns the created product information on success.

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: Some required product fields are missing or invalid.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve tracking information for an order
get.description: Fetches real-time shipment tracking details for the specified orderId. Provides current status, location, and estimated delivery time.

404.description: Not Found - Order tracking information not found

example.message: No tracking information available for the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or has no shipment

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided information. Ensures user data validity and uniqueness. Returns user details upon successful registration.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid user registration data

example.message: Provided user registration details are invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code of the item's price, e.g. USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discounts for this item.

price.description: Original price of a single unit of the item before discounts.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for the entire cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

totalAmount.description: Total cart amount before applying discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this order item.

price.description: Original unit price of the product before discounts.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product in the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total payable amount for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment, e.g., pending, completed, failed.

status.description: Current status of the order, e.g., processing, shipped, delivered.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway handling the transaction

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment chosen by the user

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

currency.description: The currency code used in the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order linked to this payment

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction

transactionId.description: Identifier for the related payment transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message or status from the payment gateway

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment referenced by the webhook

status.description: The current status of the payment as reported by the webhook

transactionId.description: Transaction ID associated with this payment webhook event

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category or classification of the product

currency.description: Currency code for the product price in ISO 4217 format

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Quantity of the product currently in stock

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created in ISO 8601 format

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

description.example: A high-quality wireless headset with noise cancellation

stock.description: Number of units currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated in ISO 8601 format

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

status.description: Current status of the order shipment

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

active.description: Indicates if the user account should be active

country.description: Country where the user is located

phone.description: Phone number of the user including country code

userType.description: Role or type classification of the user

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active

country.description: Country where the user is located

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created in ISO 8601 format

phone.description: Phone number of the user including country code

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated in ISO 8601 format

userType.description: Role or type classification of the user

error.description: Short description of the error type

message.description: Detailed error message providing more information

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

timestamp.description: Time at which the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

path.description: API endpoint path that generated the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request to trace the error

details.description: List of detailed error items explaining each issue

field.description: Name of the field causing the error

issue.description: Description of the specific issue with the field

error.description: Short description of the error type

message.description: Detailed error message providing more information

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

timestamp.description: Time at which the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request to trace the error
